armorSuppressesRanks.hint: Alternate rule. If enabled, wearing AV above a rank's maximum suppresses it.
armorSuppressesRanks.name: Armor Suppresses Ranks

armorWeakensRanks.hint: Alternate rule. If enabled, wearing AV above a rank's maximum removes proficiency.
armorWeakensRanks.name: Armor Weakens Ranks

autoChangeVisionModes.hint: If enabled, vision modes will automatically be changed based on abilities and down state.
autoChangeVisionModes.name: Automatically Change Vision Modes

autoPanelCollapseTime.hint: Automatically collapse chat message panels older than this many minutes.
autoPanelCollapseTime.name: Automatic Panel Collapse Time

autoPayAbilityCosts.hint: If enabled, HP, MP, and GP costs of abilities will be paid automatically upon use.
autoPayAbilityCosts.name: Automatically Pay Ability Costs

autoTokenMagicConditionEffects.hint: Automatically add visual effects to tokens based on their current conditions. Requires the Token Magic FX module.
autoTokenMagicConditionEffects.name: Automatic Token Magic Condition Effects

compendiumTooltips.hint: If enabled, tooltips will be displayed for compendium entries.
compendiumTooltips.name: Compendium Tooltips

confirmStatDiceRerolls.hint: If enabled, spent stat dice will require confirmation before rerolling.
confirmStatDiceRerolls.name: Confirm Stat Dice Rerolls

contentLinkTooltips.hint: If enabled, tooltips will be displayed for content links.
contentLinkTooltips.name: Content Link Tooltips

defaultConeAngle.hint: The default angle in degrees for cones.
defaultConeAngle.name: Default Cone Angle

defaultDragonBreathAngle.hint: The default angle in degrees for dragon breaths.
defaultDragonBreathAngle.name: Default Dragon Breath Angle

defaultPanelCollapseState.hint: Default state for chat message panels.
defaultPanelCollapseState.name: Default Panel Collapse State

developerMode.hint: Check this if you are a developer of the Teriock system and need additional features. Do not check this otherwise. It is likely to break your game. Even module developers shouldn't check this.
developerMode.name: Developer Mode

documentDamageSources.hint: Journals that contain damage types that can be referenced when building damage rolls.
documentDamageSources.name: Damage Type Sources

documentDrainSources.hint: Journals that contain drain types that can be referenced when building drain rolls.
documentDrainSources.name: Drain Type Sources

floatingActorTabs.hint: Whether tabs on actor sheets hover outside the window frame.
floatingActorTabs.name: Floating Actor Tabs

gmDocumentNotesJournalName.hint: Name of the journal entry that linked document notes will automatically be added to.
gmDocumentNotesJournalName.name: GM Document Notes Journal Name

hideBasicAbilitiesByDefault.hint: If enabled, basic abilities will be hidden by default on all actor sheets.
hideBasicAbilitiesByDefault.name: Hide Basic Abilities by Default

hideInactiveDocumentsByDefault.hint: If enabled, inactive documents will be hidden by default on all actor sheets.
hideInactiveDocumentsByDefault.name: Hide Inactive Documents by Default

nonHierarchicalChanges.hint: If enabled, effects can apply changes to other items or effects that they are not descended from. For actors with lots of items and effects, this can cause performance issues. Disable to improve performance.
nonHierarchicalChanges.name: Non-Hierarchical Changes

openChatDocuments.hint: If enabled, players can open documents that have been shared in chat even without ownership.
openChatDocuments.name: Open Chat Documents

openChatImages.hint: If enabled, players can open the images of panels in chat.
openChatImages.name: Open Chat Images

placeTemplateOnAbilityUse.hint: If enabled, using abilities with an area of effect will automatically place a measured template.
placeTemplateOnAbilityUse.name: Place Template on Ability Use

playerMacrosFolderName.hint: Name of the folder for macros players create with hotbar drops.
playerMacrosFolderName.name: Player Macros Folder Name

previewSheets.hint: If enabled, players without ownership over sheets will be able to open previews of them from chat messages and other panels.
previewSheets.name: Preview Sheets

rollAttackOnArmamentUse.hint: If enabled, using armaments will automatically roll Basic Attack.
rollAttackOnArmamentUse.name: Roll Attack on Armament Use

secretEquipment.hint: If enabled, equipment will be secret when used by default.
secretEquipment.name: Secret Armaments

showLongRestDialog.hint: If enabled, a dialog to heal, revitalize, and restore lost hit dice and mana dice will appear for each of your actors on a long rest.
showLongRestDialog.name: Show Long Rest Dialog

showRollDialogs.hint: If enabled, a dialog will be shown before making most rolls.
showRollDialogs.name: Show Roll Dialogs

sidebarTooltips.hint: If enabled, tooltips will be displayed for sidebar entries.
sidebarTooltips.name: Sidebar Tooltips

sortNewPlayerMacros.hint: New player macros will be created in folders corresponding to the individual players.
sortNewPlayerMacros.name: Sort New Player Macros

styleDice.hint: Style dice based on damage type, drain type, etc. Requires Dice So Nice! module.
styleDice.name: Style Dice

systemLinks.hint: If enabled, links that can be opened within Foundry will do so instead of to the wiki.
systemLinks.name: System Links

systemTooltips.hint: If enabled, links that can be opened within Foundry will display tooltips.
systemTooltips.name: System Tooltips

trackSustainedConsequences.hint: If enabled, sustained consequences will be tracked and turned inactive or deleted based on the ability sustaining them.
trackSustainedConsequences.name: Track sustained consequences.

twoHandedArmaments.hint: If enabled, armaments will be two-handed when used by default.
twoHandedArmaments.name: Two-Handed Armaments
